ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in units */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity of the product that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Default quantity of the product to reorder */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the product is discontinued */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store */,
  "store_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store manager */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last checked */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory */,
  "inventory_bin" TEXT /* Bin location of the product in the store */,
  "inventory_level_alert" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the inventory level is below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel of sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reorders" (
  "reorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reordered */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store placing the reorder */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being reordered */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the reorder was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reorder */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reordered products */,
  "reorder_receive_date" TEXT /* Date the reordered products were received */,
  "reorder_packaging" TEXT /* Packaging instructions for the reordered products */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_module" TEXT /* Module or feature of the system being accessed */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier */,
  "supplier_rating" REAL /* Rating or evaluation of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity */,
  "product_supplier_status" TEXT /* Status of the product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_supplier_last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)
